title: B.Sc Jobs 2026 – Manager
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill Manager vacancy in Telangana. Candidates with a Bachelor’s Degree in Science or Engineering can apply online before 28 May 2026 for this contract-based opportunity with a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill Manager vacancy in Telangana. Candidates with a Bachelor’s Degree in Science or Engineering can apply online before 28 May 2026 for this contract-based opportunity with a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Hyderabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Science or Engineering
qualification.details: Manager: Bachelor's Degree in Science or Engineering from a recognized university. Minimum 02 (Two) years of post-qualification experience in administration, facility management, maintenance coordination, procurement, accounts handling, housekeeping supervision and related areas in Government Organizations, Educational Institutions, Research Organizations, PSUs, Industries, or reputed private establishments.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Manager recruitment is 28th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for the Manager post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Manager post is a Bachelor's Degree in Science or Engineering from a recognized university.

faq.question: How many years of experience are needed for the Manager position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience is required for the Manager position in relevant administrative and facility management areas.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Manager post at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Manager post is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Manager role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Manager role is Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the IIT Hyderabad Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment. However, it's always advisable to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: What are the key responsibilities of a Manager at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: Key responsibilities include administration, facility management, maintenance coordination, procurement, accounts handling, and housekeeping supervision.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
